channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Demi Moore Steps Out with Her Tiny Chihuahua Pilaf in Milan, Plus Bella Hadid, Jerry Seinfeld, Cillian Murphy and More
item.description: From Milan to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Gwyneth Paltrow Shared How to a Style an Oversized V-Neck Sweater: 'Tuck It in, Roll Up the Sleeves'
item.description: Try the look for yourself with these similar styles at Amazon

item.title: Disney Removes All Remnants of Aerosmith from Rock ‘n’ Roller Coaster 1 Day After Ride’s Closure
item.description: The iconic ride at Disney’s Hollywood Studios in Florida is set to be transformed into the Rock ‘n’ Roller Coaster Starring The Muppets

item.title: Kaley Cuoco Reveals Icy First Encounter with Rose McGowan When She Joined “Charmed”: 'I Still Don't Know If She Liked Me’
item.description: Cuoco spoke to Dax Shepard about her relationship with McGowan on the Feb. 9 episode of his 'Armchair Expert' podcast

item.title: Kelly Clarkson’s Modern Furniture Line Is Up to 79% Off — Save on ‘Rich’-Looking Sofas, Accent Chairs, and Cabinets
item.description: They bring “brightness and warmth” to shoppers’ homes

item.title: Camila Cabello's Sexiest Shots To Celebrate Her 29th Birthday!
item.description: Camila Cabello may like it when you call her "Señorita," but just one hit of her hot shots and .... "you'll never ever, ever be the same!" From bold b...

item.title: Kelly Osbourne Friends Concerned Over Weight Loss, But Understand She's Grieving
item.description: Kelly Osbourne's lost a lot of weight recently, and while it has some folks around her concerned ... it sounds it's a direct result of her famous fath...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Argues With Nancy Mace During Epstein Deposition, Video Shows
item.description: Hillary Clinton locked horns with Nancy Mace while the former secretary of state was deposed about Jeffrey Epstein last week — and their heated back a...

item.title: Tyrese Gibson Announces Paul Walker's Charity Has Raised Nearly $1 Million
item.description: Tyrese Gibson is honoring his pal’s legacy in the fast lane ... announcing nearly $1 million has been raised in honor of his late "Fast & Furious" cos...

item.title: 'The Traitors' Winner Rob Rausch Bought an Alabama Home Just Before His Win
item.description: "The Traitors" season 4 winner, Rob Rausch, appears to have used some of his reality show money to buy some property ... TMZ has learned.According to ...
